---
name: grill-me-testcase-design
description: 'Test-Driven Development (TDD) skill for designing and implementing tests based on existing architecture and code evidence.'
user-invocable: true
---

Interview me relentlessly about every aspect of all test cases in the **intention architecture model** and the code base until we reach a shared understanding, then complete the test case design without leaving any conflicts in all of the test cases. Walk down each branch of the design tree, resolving dependencies between decisions one by one. And finally, if a question can be answered by exploring the code base, explore the code base instead.
